name: Calendar: Create Event

description.en: Create an event on the calendar the agent is connected to (Google, Microsoft, or Apple). The backend routes the call to the right provider automatically.
description.de: Erstellt ein Ereignis im verbundenen Kalender des Agenten (Google, Microsoft oder Apple). Das Backend leitet die Anfrage automatisch an den richtigen Anbieter weiter.
description.es: Create an event on the calendar the agent is connected to (Google, Microsoft, or Apple). The backend routes the call to the right provider automatically.
description.fr: Create an event on the calendar the agent is connected to (Google, Microsoft, or Apple). The backend routes the call to the right provider automatically.
description.ro: Create an event on the calendar the agent is connected to (Google, Microsoft, or Apple). The backend routes the call to the right provider automatically.
description.it: Create an event on the calendar the agent is connected to (Google, Microsoft, or Apple). The backend routes the call to the right provider automatically.

bot: Use this to schedule meetings, appointments, or reminders on the user's calendar. Provider is determined by the connected integration — do not ask which provider.

inputs.name: Title
inputs.bot: Concise event title, e.g. 'Lunch with Sarah', 'Iron Clothes', 'Team standup'.

inputs.name: Description
inputs.bot: Optional longer description or agenda for the event.

inputs.name: Start
inputs.bot: Event start in ISO 8601 with timezone offset, e.g. '2026-04-21T14:00:00+02:00' or '2026-04-21T12:00:00Z'.

inputs.name: End
inputs.bot: Event end in ISO 8601 with timezone offset. If the user did not specify, default to one hour after start.

inputs.name: Timezone

description.en: IANA timezone name for the event
description.es: IANA timezone name for the event
description.fr: IANA timezone name for the event
description.ro: IANA timezone name for the event
description.it: IANA timezone name for the event

inputs.bot: IANA timezone, e.g. 'Europe/Vienna', 'America/New_York'. Use the user's timezone from context.

inputs.name: Location
inputs.bot: Physical address, room, or video call link.

inputs.name: All day

description.en: Whether this is an all-day event
description.es: Whether this is an all-day event
description.fr: Whether this is an all-day event
description.ro: Whether this is an all-day event
description.it: Whether this is an all-day event

inputs.bot: True for full-day events where a specific time is not meaningful.
